provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, enormous reptilian alien with dark green scales gone grey at the jaw and crest from age, a massive bony crest ridge bearing an ancestral crown-cap of black iron and gold, amber eyes gone pale with decades of command, thick heavy tail that moves slowly and deliberately, wearing ancestral plate armor that has been repaired and reforged across three generations of wearers with each repair visible as a different metal tone, a blood-crimson cloak trimmed in black-gold covering one shoulder, a debt-ledger seal on a chain at the waist, no weapon visible because a House Lord does not need to threaten

judgment.explanation: Alt seed House Lord. Consistent imposing authority.
